issues.description: Missing condition to check for active DON!! card. Effect requires 'You may give 1 active DON!! card' which should be a HasAttachedDon condition with value ≥1
Filter is 'Any' but should restrict to: (red Event) OR (Character with cost ≥3). Filter must specify 'color:Red,type:Event' OR 'type:Character,cost:≥3'
Missing action to reveal the selected card. DSL should include a RevealFromHand or similar action before adding to hand
Missing SearchDeck scope parameter. Effect looks at top 4 cards and places rest at bottom; this requires 'lookAtTop':4 and 'placeRest':'BottomOfDeck' parameters
Missing action to handle card placement. After selecting up to 1 card, remaining 3 cards must be placed at bottom in any order—requires explicit action or placement rule
